name: THUNDER MOUNTAIN GOLD INC
business: Thunder Mountain Gold Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on high-grade zinc, silver, gold, and copper at its South Mountain Project in Idaho. The Company has no current production or revenue.

exposures.sentence: It is a polymetallic Exploration Stage Property focused on high-grade zinc, silver, gold, and copper.

catalysts.event: Core drilling and additional geophysical and geochemical studies at South Mountain
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, the Company intends to conduct core drilling and additional geophysical and geochemical studies at South Mountain to further delineate mineralization and support future technical and economic evaluations.
